scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir frontend dev" "uv run --directory backend fastapi dev app/main.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.dev:backend: uv run --directory backend fastapi dev app/main.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir frontend lint && uv run --directory backend ruff check
scripts.test: pnpm --dir frontend test && uv run --directory backend pytest
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --directory backend alembic upgrade head
